if.test: search_type != null and search_type != '' and search_text != '' and search_text != ''

choose.when: ORDER BY ${sortField} ${sortType} NULLS LAST, a.book_idx DESC
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY lend_cnt * lend_weight + reserve_cnt * reserve_weight + comment_cnt * comment_weight + recommend_cnt * recommend_weight + audio_view_cnt * audiobook_weight + elearn_view_cnt * elearning_weight DESC

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_BESTBOOK

SELECT bestbook_idx, book_idx, print_seq, add_id, add_date, book_name, book_pubname, author_name, book_image, type, book_info FROM ( SELECT b.bestbook_idx, b.book_idx, b.print_seq, b.add_id, b.add_date, NULL AS book_name, NULL AS book_pubname, NULL AS author_name, NULL AS book_image, NULL AS type, NULL AS book_info FROM ELIB_BESTBOOK b WHERE b.book_idx = 0 UNION ALL SELECT b.bestbook_idx, b.book_idx, b.print_seq, b.add_id, b.add_date, a.book_name, a.book_pubname, a.author_name, a.book_image, a.type, c.book_info FROM ELIB_BESTBOOK b, ELIB_BOOK a, ELIB_BOOKINFO c WHERE b.book_idx = a.book_idx AND b.book_idx = c.book_idx ) ORDER BY bestbook_idx

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT bestbook_idx, book_idx, print_seq, add_id, add_date, book_name, book_pubname, author_name, book_image, type, book_info FROM ( SELECT b.bestbook_idx, b.book_idx, b.print_seq, b.add_id, b.add_date, NULL AS book_name, NULL AS book_pubname, NULL AS author_name, NULL AS book_image, NULL AS type, NULL AS book_info FROM ELIB_BESTBOOK b WHERE b.book_idx = 0 UNION ALL SELECT b.bestbook_idx, b.book_idx, b.print_seq, b.add_id, b.add_date, a.book_name, a.book_pubname, a.author_name, a.book_image, a.type, c.book_info FROM ELIB_BESTBOOK b, ELIB_BOOK a, ELIB_BOOKINFO c WHERE b.book_idx = a.book_idx AND b.book_idx = c.book_idx ) ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.RANDOM ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT bestbook_idx, book_idx, print_seq, add_id, add_date, book_name, book_pubname, author_name, book_image, type, parent_name, cate_name, library_name, comp_name, lend_cnt, reserve_cnt, comment_cnt, recommend_cnt, audio_view_cnt, elearn_view_cnt, ( lend_cnt * lend_weight + reserve_cnt * reserve_weight + comment_cnt * comment_weight + recommend_cnt * recommend_weight + audio_view_cnt * audiobook_weight + elearn_view_cnt * elearning_weight ) AS rank_index FROM ( SELECT b.bestbook_idx, b.book_idx, b.print_seq, b.add_id, b.add_date, NULL AS book_name, NULL AS book_pubname, NULL AS author_name, NULL AS book_image, NULL AS type, NULL AS date_range, NULL AS types, NULL AS lend_weight, NULL AS reserve_weight, NULL AS comment_weight, NULL AS recommend_weight, NULL AS audiobook_weight, NULL AS elearning_weight, NULL AS parent_name, NULL AS cate_name, NULL AS library_name, NULL AS comp_name, 0 AS lend_cnt, 0 AS reserve_cnt, 0 AS comment_cnt, 0 AS recommend_cnt, 0 AS audio_view_cnt, 0 AS elearn_view_cnt FROM ELIB_BESTBOOK b WHERE b.book_idx = 0 UNION ALL SELECT b.bestbook_idx, b.book_idx, b.print_seq, b.add_id, b.add_date, a.book_name, a.book_pubname, a.author_name, a.book_image, a.type, a.date_range, a.types, a.lend_weight, a.reserve_weight, a.comment_weight, a.recommend_weight, a.audiobook_weight, a.elearning_weight, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = a.parent_id) AS parent_name, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = a.cate_id) AS cate_name, CASE WHEN a.library_code = '9999999' THEN '통합' ELSE (SELECT z.homepage_name FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE z WHERE a.library_code = SUBSTR(Z.homepage_code, 1, 8)) END AS library_name, (SELECT z.comp_name FROM ELIB_COMPANY z WHERE INSTR(z.com_code, a.com_code) > 0) AS comp_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM elib_lend z WHERE A.book_idx = z.book_idx AND (SYSDATE - lend_dt) <= a.date_range) AS lend_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM elib_reserve z WHERE A.book_idx = z.book_idx AND (SYSDATE - reserve_dt) <= a.date_range) AS reserve_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM elib_comment z WHERE A.book_idx = z.book_idx AND (SYSDATE - regdt) <= a.date_range) AS comment_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM elib_recommend z WHERE a.book_idx = z.book_idx AND (SYSDATE - regdt) <= a.date_range) AS recommend_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM elib_audio_stat z WHERE a.book_idx = z.book_idx AND (SYSDATE - reg_dt) <= a.date_range) AS audio_view_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM elib_elearn_stat z WHERE a.book_idx = z.book_idx AND (SYSDATE - reg_dt) <= a.date_range) AS elearn_view_cnt FROM ELIB_BESTBOOK b, ( SELECT book_idx, book_name, book_pubname, author_name, book_image, TYPE, parent_id, cate_id, library_code, com_code, (SELECT value FROM elib_config WHERE name = 'date_range') AS date_range, (SELECT value FROM elib_config WHERE name = 'types') AS types, (SELECT value FROM elib_config WHERE name = 'lend_weight') AS lend_weight, (SELECT value FROM elib_config WHERE name = 'reserve_weight') AS reserve_weight, (SELECT value FROM elib_config WHERE name = 'comment_weight') AS comment_weight, (SELECT value FROM elib_config WHERE name = 'recommend_weight') AS recommend_weight, (SELECT value FROM elib_config WHERE name = 'audiobook_weight') AS audiobook_weight, (SELECT value FROM elib_config WHERE name = 'elearning_weight') AS elearning_weight FROM ELIB_BOOK ) a WHERE b.book_idx = a.book_idx ) ORDER BY bestbook_idx
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_BESTBOOK WHERE book_idx = #{book_idx}
SELECT bestbook_idx, book_idx, print_seq FROM ELIB_BESTBOOK WHERE bestbook_idx = #{bestbook_idx} + 1
SELECT bestbook_idx, book_idx, print_seq FROM ELIB_BESTBOOK WHERE bestbook_idx = #{bestbook_idx} - 1
mapper.insert: UPDATE ELIB_BESTBOOK SET book_idx = #{book_idx}, add_id = #{add_id}, add_date = SYSDATE WHERE bestbook_idx = #{bestbook_idx}
mapper.delete: UPDATE ELIB_BESTBOOK SET ADD_ID = NULL, ADD_DATE = NULL, BOOK_IDX = 0 WHERE book_idx = #{book_idx}
mapper.sql: FROM ELIB_BOOK a, ELIB_BOOKINFO b WHERE a.book_idx = b.book_idx AND a.use_yn = 'Y' AND a.type IN ('EBK', 'ADO') ORDER BY a.book_idx DESC
mapper.select: SELECT a.cat_bestbook_idx, a.book_code, a.print_seq, a.add_id, a.add_date, b.book_idx, b.book_name, b.book_pubname, b.author_name, b.book_image, a.parent_id, a.cate_id, b.lend_total, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = a.parent_id) AS parent_name, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = a.cate_id) AS cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY_BESTBOOK a, ELIB_BOOK b WHERE a.book_code = b.book_code AND a.parent_id = #{parent_id} ORDER BY a.print_seq
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(cat_bestbook_idx),0)+1 FROM ELIB_CATEGORY_BESTBOOK
INSERT INTO ELIB_CATEGORY_BESTBOOK ( cat_bestbook_idx, book_code, parent_id, cate_id, add_id, add_date, print_seq ) VALUES ( #{cat_bestbook_idx}, #{book_code}, #{parent_id}, #{cate_id}, #{add_id}, SYSDATE, (SELECT NVL(MAX(print_seq),0)+1 FROM ELIB_CATEGORY_BESTBOOK WHERE parent_id = #{parent_id} AND cate_id = #{cate_id}) )
mapper.select: SELECT cat_bestbook_idx, book_code, print_seq, parent_id, cate_id FROM ELIB_CATEGORY_BESTBOOK WHERE print_seq = ( SELECT NVL(MIN(print_seq),0) FROM ELIB_CATEGORY_BESTBOOK WHERE print_seq > #{print_seq} AND parent_id = #{parent_id} ) AND parent_id = #{parent_id} AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT cat_bestbook_idx, book_idx, print_seq, parent_id, cate_id FROM ELIB_CATEGORY_BESTBOOK WHERE print_seq = ( SELECT NVL(MAX(print_seq),0) FROM ELIB_CATEGORY_BESTBOOK WHERE print_seq < #{print_seq} AND parent_id = #{parent_id} ) AND parent_id = #{parent_id} AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.sql: SELECT type, book_idx, book_name, book_pubname, author_name, parent_name, cate_name, library_name, comp_name, lend_cnt, reserve_cnt, comment_cnt, recommend_cnt, audio_view_cnt, elearn_view_cnt, ( lend_cnt * lend_weight + reserve_cnt * reserve_weight + comment_cnt * comment_weight + recommend_cnt * recommend_weight + audio_view_cnt * audiobook_weight + elearn_view_cnt * elearning_weight ) AS rank_index FROM ( SELECT a.book_idx, a.book_name, a.book_pubname, a.author_name, a.book_image, a.type, a.library_code, a.com_code, a.date_range, a.types, a.lend_weight, a.reserve_weight, a.comment_weight, a.recommend_weight, a.audiobook_weight, a.elearning_weight, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = a.parent_id) AS parent_name, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = a.cate_id) AS cate_name, CASE WHEN a.library_code = '9999999' THEN '통합' ELSE (SELECT z.homepage_name FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE z WHERE a.library_code = SUBSTR(Z.homepage_code, 1, 8)) END AS library_name, (SELECT z.comp_name FROM ELIB_COMPANY z WHERE INSTR(z.com_code, a.com_code) > 0) AS comp_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM elib_lend z WHERE A.book_idx = z.book_idx AND (SYSDATE - lend_dt) <= a.date_range) AS lend_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM elib_reserve z WHERE A.book_idx = z.book_idx AND (SYSDATE - reserve_dt) <= a.date_range) AS reserve_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM elib_comment z WHERE A.book_idx = z.book_idx AND (SYSDATE - regdt) <= a.date_range) AS comment_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM elib_recommend z WHERE a.book_idx = z.book_idx AND (SYSDATE - regdt) <= a.date_range) AS recommend_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM elib_audio_stat z WHERE a.book_idx = z.book_idx AND (SYSDATE - reg_dt) <= a.date_range) AS audio_view_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM elib_elearn_stat z WHERE a.book_idx = z.book_idx AND (SYSDATE - reg_dt) <= a.date_range) AS elearn_view_cnt FROM ( SELECT book_idx, book_name, book_pubname, author_name, book_image, TYPE, parent_id, cate_id, library_code, com_code, (SELECT value FROM elib_config WHERE name = 'date_range') AS date_range, (SELECT value FROM elib_config WHERE name = 'types') AS types, (SELECT value FROM elib_config WHERE name = 'lend_weight') AS lend_weight, (SELECT value FROM elib_config WHERE name = 'reserve_weight') AS reserve_weight, (SELECT value FROM elib_config WHERE name = 'comment_weight') AS comment_weight, (SELECT value FROM elib_config WHERE name = 'recommend_weight') AS recommend_weight, (SELECT value FROM elib_config WHERE name = 'audiobook_weight') AS audiobook_weight, (SELECT value FROM elib_config WHERE name = 'elearning_weight') AS elearning_weight FROM ELIB_BOOK ) a WHERE INSTR(#{types}, a.type) > 0 ) a WHERE 1=1
